name: default claude×codex pair on shared worktree

expected.message:
[m5:buddy-system] You are maw-js-fix-resolver-claude, paired with maw-js-fix-resolver-codex.

  TASK: fix the resolver
  CONTEXT: ψ/inbox/buddy/fix-resolver.md
  WORKTREE: /opt/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js.wt-fix-resolver
  LINEAGE: Buddy pair born by maw buddy

  SELF ADDRESS: maw-js-fix-resolver-claude
  BUDDY ADDRESS: maw-js-fix-resolver-codex

  TALK TO YOUR BUDDY:
    maw hey maw-js-fix-resolver-codex "<message>"

  Example:
    maw hey maw-js-fix-resolver-codex "I'll handle the spec, you handle impl"

  YOUR ROLE: spec
  BUDDY ROLE: impl
  YOUR ENGINE: claude
  BUDDY ENGINE: codex

  OWNERSHIP: Shared worktree. State intended write scope before editing; do not revert buddy edits; coordinate before touching the same files.
  CADENCE: Use maw hey for sync. Send ACK, first-move plan, blocker/escalation, and DONE with evidence. Batch updates; do not loop or message yourself.
  VERIFICATION: Agree on the smallest test/build command that proves done, then report the exact evidence.
  GIT: Do not commit or push unless the lead explicitly assigns that responsibility.
  LOOP GUARD: Do not maw hey yourself. Avoid infinite ping-pong; prefer concise batched updates.
  PEEK: maw tmux peek maw-js-fix-resolver-codex

  DONE: Report DONE via maw hey to your buddy with evidence and any remaining risks.
  START NOW: Read the context file, ACK your buddy, state your intended write scope, then propose your first move.

input.cadence: Sync every 10 minutes via maw hey; checkpoint at each fixture.
input.firstMove: Read ctx.md, then ACK with your read of the task.
